title: ggen-dspy optimizer integration tests
changes: test_bootstrap_compile_collects_demos: MockModule returns fixed output matching trainset; compiled module name contains '+Bootstrap'
test_bootstrap_compile_empty_trainset: empty trainset returns module unchanged (no '+Bootstrap')
test_mipro_compile_no_model_returns_unchanged: no model env var or .with_model(); compile returns module unchanged (no '+MIPRO')
test_mipro_compile_with_model_wraps_in_instructed_module: preset candidates injected via with_preset_candidates(); compiled name contains '+MIPRO'
Added `testing-utils` as default feature in Cargo.toml to expose MockModule and test_output for integration tests without requiring explicit --features flag
with_preset_candidates method on MiproOptimizer gated to cfg(any(test, feature = live-llm-tests, feature = testing-utils))
pub mod testing in lib.rs gated to cfg(any(test, feature = live-llm-tests, feature = testing-utils))
Uses existing ggen_dspy::testing::MockModule and test_output helpers
